home.title: Home
home.description: Find the best car rental deals.

bookings.title: Browse & Book Cars
bookings.description: Search our rental fleet by pickup location, dates, and filters.

carDetails.title: {carName}
carDetails.description: View rental details, pricing, and services for {carName}.

reservation.title: Book {carName}
reservation.description: Complete your rental reservation for {carName}. Choose pickup and drop-off, add services, and confirm your booking.
reservation.fallbackDescription: Complete your car rental reservation. Select dates, locations, and services to confirm your booking.

bussinessAccounts.title: Business Account
bussinessAccounts.description: Register your company for a Rental Gate business account. Get tailored fleet rental solutions for businesses across Saudi Arabia.

userProfile.title: My Profile
userProfile.description: Manage your personal information, wallet balance, loyalty points, license details, and bookings on Rental Gate.

myBookings.title: My Bookings
myBookings.description: View and manage your current and past car rental reservations on Rental Gate.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.description: Check your wallet balance, view transaction history, and manage earned offers on Rental Gate.

offeredCars.title: {offerLabel}
offeredCars.description: Browse rental cars in the {offerLabel} offer. Compare prices and book your car on Rental Gate.
offeredCars.descriptionWithCount: Browse {count} rental cars in the {offerLabel} offer. Compare prices and book on Rental Gate.
offeredCars.fallbackDescription: Browse cars included in special rental offers. Compare prices and book on Rental Gate.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.description: View the terms and conditions for Rental Gate. Learn about your rights and obligations as a user or business on Rental Gate.
